_comment: Synthetic pre-market wire for the diagnostics universe. ts_offset_min is relative to the run's `now`. Seeds: dx-002 duplicates dx-001 (same canonical URL + utm) to prove dedupe; dx-016 is timestamped in the future to prove the no-look-ahead guard; dx-011 is materiality-1 noise dropped by the floor; EDGAR's newest pull is >75min old to seed a stale source-health state.

items.title: CMS Expands Medicare Coverage for Natera's Signatera MRD Test in Breast Cancer
items.raw_text: CMS has expanded Medicare coverage for Natera's Signatera molecular residual disease test to include adjuvant and recurrence monitoring in breast cancer, effective immediately. The MolDX decision covers an estimated 180,000 additional patients annually and follows positive data from the company's BESPOKE studies.

items.title: Medicare Coverage Expanded for Natera Signatera MRD Test in Breast Cancer
items.raw_text: CMS expanded Medicare coverage for Natera's Signatera MRD test in breast cancer under the MolDX program, covering adjuvant and recurrence monitoring settings.

items.title: Veracyte Reports Decipher Prostate Inclusion in Updated NCCN Guidelines
items.raw_text: Veracyte announced that the updated NCCN Guidelines for prostate cancer now include the Decipher Prostate Genomic Classifier with a level 1B evidence designation across localized risk groups, the only gene-expression test at that level. The company said the inclusion supports continued test volume growth and payer coverage expansion.

items.title: Guardant Health Discloses CMS Preliminary Rate Cut for Shield CRC Screening Test
items.raw_text: Guardant Health disclosed that CMS published a preliminary gapfill determination cutting the Shield colorectal cancer screening test reimbursement rate to $720 from $920. The company said it will submit reconsideration comments and reiterated its Shield volume guidance for the year.

items.title: GeneDx Preannounces Q2 Revenue Above Guidance on Exome Volume Strength
items.raw_text: GeneDx preannounced preliminary Q2 revenue of $112-115 million, above its prior guidance of $102-106 million, citing exome and genome test volume strength and faster reimbursement collections. Full results are scheduled for July 29.

items.title: Tempus, AstraZeneca Expand Partnership to MRD Algorithm Development
items.raw_text: Tempus AI and AstraZeneca expanded their existing partnership to co-develop a tumor-informed MRD algorithm on the Tempus xM platform, with an upfront payment and milestone structure the companies did not disclose. Initial deployment targets lung and breast cancer trials.

items.title: Myriad Genetics Loses UnitedHealthcare Contract for GeneSight
items.raw_text: Myriad Genetics confirmed UnitedHealthcare will not renew its national contract for the GeneSight pharmacogenomic test effective September 1, pressuring roughly $45 million of annualized revenue. Myriad said it is in discussions with the payer on a revised evidence package.

items.title: Adaptive's clonoSEQ MRD Data Published in NEJM Myeloma Study
items.raw_text: A New England Journal of Medicine study using Adaptive Biotechnologies' clonoSEQ assay showed MRD-guided therapy de-escalation preserved outcomes in newly diagnosed multiple myeloma. Adaptive said the publication supports clonoSEQ's role as the trial endpoint standard in myeloma.

items.title: FDA Finalizes Timeline for Phase Two of LDT Enforcement
items.raw_text: FDA finalized the phase-two timeline of its laboratory-developed test rule, requiring registration, listing and adverse-event reporting for most LDTs within 12 months. The agency said high-complexity oncology assays remain the enforcement priority, while legal challenges from lab groups continue.

items.title: ArteraAI Raises $90M Series C to Expand Digital Pathology Platform
items.raw_text: ArteraAI raised a $90 million Series C led by a crossover fund to expand its digital pathology platform beyond prostate cancer into breast and bladder indications. The company said its multimodal AI test is now used in more than 60 academic and community sites.

items.title: Personalis to Present at Upcoming Goldman Healthcare Conference
items.raw_text: Personalis announced its management will present at the upcoming Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference. A webcast will be available on the company's investor relations site.

items.title: Castle Biosciences DecisionDx-Melanoma Data Selected for ASCO Oral Session
items.raw_text: Castle Biosciences said new DecisionDx-Melanoma outcomes data from a 10,000-patient registry cohort was selected for an oral session at ASCO. The data tie test-guided surveillance intensity to earlier recurrence detection.

items.title: BillionToOne Expands UNITY Fetal Risk Screen Into Two New State Medicaid Programs
items.raw_text: BillionToOne said its UNITY Fetal Risk Screen is now reimbursed by Medicaid programs in Ohio and Georgia, bringing covered states to 14. The company cited single-gene NIPT differentiation in sickle cell and cystic fibrosis carrier screening.

items.title: Caris Life Sciences Receives FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for Blood-Based Assay
items.raw_text: Caris Life Sciences received FDA Breakthrough Device designation for its blood-based therapy selection assay covering solid tumors. Caris said the designation accelerates its planned PMA submission and Medicare coverage strategy.

items.title: Reimbursement Pressure Builds Across Genomic Testing as Payers Tighten Prior Auth
items.raw_text: Commercial payers are expanding prior auth requirements across genomic testing categories, with utilization-management vendors now covering hereditary cancer panels and tumor profiling. Lab executives say reimbursement friction is lengthening cash-collection cycles industry-wide.

items.title: Natera Analyst Day Webcast Begins
items.raw_text: Natera's analyst day webcast is scheduled to begin at 10:00 a.m. ET today. Management is expected to update long-range Signatera volume targets.

items.title: Biodesix Publishes Validation Study for Nodify Lung Nodule Strategy
items.raw_text: Biodesix published a prospective validation study showing its Nodify testing strategy reclassified 42 percent of intermediate-risk lung nodules, reducing unnecessary invasive procedures. The study appears in CHEST.

items.title: Guardant Reveal ctDNA Surveillance Data Published in JCO
items.raw_text: Guardant Health's Reveal ctDNA assay detected colorectal cancer recurrence a median 5.2 months ahead of imaging in a JCO-published surveillance study. Guardant said the data support broader tissue-free MRD adoption.

items.title: Veracyte Announces Date of Q2 2026 Earnings Call
items.raw_text: Veracyte announced it will report Q2 2026 financial results on August 4 after market close, with a conference call to follow. Consensus models roughly 11 percent testing revenue growth.
